# Phase 45 Raw Synthetic L2 Tick-Lake Materialization

Generated UTC: 2026-07-16T14:41:28.490494+00:00

This phase makes the raw websocket-like tick-lake layer explicit. The default run materializes a small partitioned proof sample and estimates the 80GB-class full raw lake; it does not pretend that the compact Phase 42 event-state parquet is the raw archive.

Sample raw root: `raw_synthetic_l2_full_year`

Guarded full materialization command: `python scripts/run_phase45_raw_tick_lake_materializer.py --mode full --confirm-full-materialization --target-full-raw-gb 83.240 --raw-root raw_synthetic_l2_full_year`

| phase45_estimated_rows_for_target_full_raw_lake | 5.48334e+08 | Rows implied by target GB at measured raw-lake compression |
| phase45_available_disk_gb | 137.839 | Free disk on current workspace drive after materialization |
| phase45_raw_lake_root | raw_synthetic_l2_full_year | Local raw-lake root; intentionally ignored by git |

| phase45_full_80gb_dense_lake_materialized | 0 | 80GB-class densified raw lake was not materialized by Phase45 |
